entries.description: Pre-Session-1 spec amendment landed in commit 87dc900. Reduced 4 sessions to 3 (deferred healthcare-accessdb to Set 018), re-sequenced harvester before platform, updated migration target from Option D to Option B per Set 016/017 outcomes. Spec status-note preamble records the supersession.
Registered Session 1 start via ai_router.session_state.register_session_start. Snapshot flipped to in-progress; work_started event appended.

Audited dabbler-access-harvester via filesystem + git probes. Confirmed Option D layout unchanged from Set 016 audit (.bare/ + .git pointer + main/); all three anomalies still present (.claude/worktrees/vba-symbol-resolution-session-1, empty docs/, empty tmp/). Active branch on main: migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip with dirty working tree (modified/deleted .accdb sample files, modified activity-log.json, untracked samples/ dirs) - operator-confirmed as ghost changes revertable before migration. pip show dabbler-ai-router reports 0.1.0; import ai_router shows __version__ 0.1.1 - resolves via clean re-install. Doc references in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md all correct (use ai_router/ underscore). 20 session sets in main/docs/session-sets/, including vba-symbol-resolution-and-enrichment (slug-similar successor to the stranded PoC's branch).

Audited dabbler-platform via filesystem + git probes. Confirmed already canonical Option B-compatible layout: single working tree at repo root, no .bare/, no <repo>/main/, no <repo>-worktrees/ container. ai_router/ (underscore) directory at repo root with router-config.yaml and router-metrics.jsonl. uat_runner/ top-level package present (cli.py, runner.py, triage.py, personas.json, personas.py, remediations/, test_cases/) - the UAT DSL infrastructure per project_uat_dsl.md memory; must be preserved through migration. pip show dabbler-ai-router reports 0.1.0 (needs upgrade). Doc references in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md all correct. Active branch migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip with clean working tree. No in-flight worktrees. .tmp/ at repo root contains generated session-step caches (gitignored, not migration-relevant). .claude/settings.json is 79 bytes; brief inspection deferred to Session 3 step 2.

Authored ai-assignment.md with per-repo migration plans for both repos in scope. Each plan follows the uniform six-section shape: Findings, Current layout, Drift items, Migration steps, Risk callouts, Out of scope. Cross-repo summary section identifies operator decisions to lock before Session 2. Harvester plan: 16-step clone-and-swap including ghost-change reversion, backup ref + bundle for active branch and stranded PoC branch, .venv recreation, pip upgrade, atomic Windows-rename swap, ~1-week rollback window. Platform plan: 8-step pip-upgrade-plus-smoke-test with UAT DSL canary as the primary risk control.

Operator reviewed migration plans. Ratified default for Anomaly A's PoC branch: backup-and-leave-behind (option b). Bundle preserves 3 unique commits indefinitely; new repo does not carry the worktree-vba-symbol-resolution-session-1 branch forward. Operator response: 'trust your default'. Both other proposed defaults previously confirmed (ghost changes revertable; harvester first then platform per amended spec).

Authored change-log.md (Session 1 deliverables, Session 2/3 readiness summaries, spend, what's next), disposition.json (with verification_method='api' as required by validator; semantically the in-band review IS the verification path for audit work), activity-log.json (this file).
Content commit staged Set 015 deliverables only. Pushed to origin master. close_session run with all five gates passing.
Registered Session 2 start via ai_router.session_state.register_session_start. Snapshot flipped to in-progress for Session 2; work_started event appended.

Re-verified harvester state matches Session 1 audit. Confirmed Option D layout, three Set-016 anomalies still present (.claude/worktrees/vba-symbol-resolution-session-1, empty docs/, empty tmp/), active migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip branch with the same dirty working tree (modified/deleted .accdb files, modified activity-log.json, untracked samples/ dirs). Captured local-only git config from .bare/config: credential username, vscode-merge-base hints for main and migrate branches.

Reverted operator-confirmed ghost changes via git checkout -- docs/session-sets/blazor-add-an-order/activity-log.json samples/ followed by git clean -fd samples/. Working tree now clean; verified via git status --short --branch.

Created backup refs in old .bare/: backup/migrate-pip-20260506-132426 (from migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip) and backup/vba-poc-20260506-132426 (from worktree-vba-symbol-resolution-session-1). Created bundle files in C:\Users\denmi\source\repos\: harvester-migrate-pip-20260506-132426.bundle and harvester-vba-poc-20260506-132426.bundle. Both bundles will survive the container rename for use as recovery anchors.

Cloned origin (https://github.com/darndestdabbler/dabbler-access-harvester.git) into C:\Users\denmi\source\repos\dabbler-access-harvester-new\. Switched to migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip branch; verified HEAD bfe54d0 matches old main/'s state. Per operator decision (b), did NOT recreate the worktree-vba-symbol-resolution-session-1 branch in the new repo - bundle preserves it indefinitely.

Applied local-only git config to new repo's .git/config: credential.https://github.com.username=darndestdabbler, branch.main.vscode-merge-base=origin/main, branch.migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip.vscode-merge-base=origin/main. Standard branch tracking (remote + merge for main and migrate) was auto-set by clone+switch.

Created fresh .venv at C:\Users\denmi\source\repos\dabbler-access-harvester-new\.venv\ via python -m venv. Upgraded pip to 26.1.1. Installed -r requirements.txt; dabbler-ai-router-0.1.1 + dependencies installed cleanly. Verified: pip show reports Version 0.1.1, import ai_router; __version__ reports 0.1.1 - the pre-migration discrepancy is resolved.

Smoke-tested the new repo before the swap. from ai_router import route, send_session_complete_notification; from ai_router.session_log import SessionLog all import cleanly. Validated layout via raw git worktree list plus filesystem signal checks: no .bare/ directory, .git/ is a normal directory (not a pointer), no main/ subdirectory, source files at repo root. All four canonical Option B signals pass. Notable gap: python -m ai_router.worktree fails because PyPI's dabbler-ai-router 0.1.1 predates Set 017's worktree-CLI shipment; falling back to raw git for layout validation.

Operator-confirmed VS Code closed on harvester. Executed atomic swap as two separate mv operations: dabbler-access-harvester -> dabbler-access-harvester-old, then dabbler-access-harvester-new -> dabbler-access-harvester. No file-lock failures; cleanup-dev-orphans not needed. Final state: new canonical Option B repo at C:\Users\denmi\source\repos\dabbler-access-harvester\, old container preserved as -old for ~1 week.

Post-swap state verified: layout signals all green, git status --short --branch shows migrate/dabbler-ai-router-pip clean and tracking origin, single primary worktree at canonical path, ai_router 0.1.1 imports cleanly. Operator VS Code smoke test confirmed green: extension activates without manifest-registration errors, Cost Dashboard renders, Session Set Explorer shows expected session sets bucketed correctly.

Authored Session 2 close-out artifacts: change-log.md updated with Session 2 deliverables section + cleanup checklist for old container/bundles, disposition.json replaced with Session 2's record (next_orchestrator points at Session 3 with continue-current-trajectory rationale), activity-log.json appended with Session 2 step entries. Content commit staged orchestration-side deliverables; pushed to origin master; close_session passes all five gates.
